title: Refined Cats: Lithe
description: Updates the cat textures as well as the model to have a refreshed appearance. Optimized for slower systems (Forge/Fabric)
body:
**This is the optimized version of Refined Cats**
## THESE MODS ARE REQUIRED FOR REFINED CATS TO WORK:

1. [ETF] Entity Texture Features 

2. [EMF] Entity Model Features



**Refined Cats Lithe replaces the default cat with a custom model and brand new textures, while optimizing for slower systems**



This is the **RefinedCatsLithe** Version, there is two versions, **Refined Cats: Lithe** and **Refined Cats**

![Two versions, refined cats lithe and refined cats](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4397b12864cb37408336a6962d372b867abd782d.png)

_Lithe is designed for higher FPS and closer vanilla-like textures, removing unnecessary variants and emissives_

There is currently 12 textures, most of which are close variations of the default cat breeds. Textures will update intermittently. Refined Cats is **compatible with Forge/Fabric**

![Calico cat sitting in cherry grove](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4646bfb991eacd4ecf120b31d38801f289885bd.png)

_If you have any issues or suggestions let me know_
